display.purpose: Page-level route titles only. One per screen.

headline.purpose: Panel headings, modal titles, large stat numbers.

mono.purpose: Cert numbers, IDs, timestamps only. The Mono Contract.

shadows.name: hover-whisper
shadows.purpose: Card hover state. Not visible at rest.

shadows.name: card-raised
shadows.purpose: Expanded or selected card (e.g. open staff card).

shadows.name: modal-overlay
shadows.purpose: Sliding panels, modals, dropdowns that float above the canvas.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (color, opacity, shadow).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover / focus state changes. Chip selection.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single call-to-action. Teal fill, white text. Used for stage advancement, invite, new client.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #0D9488; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #0D9488; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action: cancel, edit, navigate. Stone background, no teal.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #F5F5F4; color: #334155; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #E7E5E0; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #E7E5E0; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px #0D9488; }

components.name: Filter Chip — Active
components.description: Active filter state. Teal fill signals the current selection.
components.css: .ds-chip-active { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #0D9488; color: #ffffff; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #0F766E; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Filter Chip — Inactive
components.description: Inactive filter state. White background, stone border.
components.css: .ds-chip-inactive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #ffffff; color: #475569; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #E7E5E0; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-chip-inactive:hover { border-color: #5eead4; color: #0D9488; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Stone border at rest, teal border + ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; color: #0F172A; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #E7E5E0; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94A3B8; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0D9488; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13,148,136,0.15); }

components.name: Client Card
components.description: The primary pipeline record unit. White surface on warm canvas, stone border, teal border on hover.
components.css: .ds-client-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #E7E5E0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-client-card:hover { border-color: #99f6e4; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-client-card-name { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #0F172A; } .ds-client-card-meta { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #64748B; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Inline pill badge for stage, cert, and authorization status. Always includes a text label.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-badge--urgent { background: #FEF2F2; color: #B91C1C; border-color: #FECACA; } .ds-badge--warning { background: #FFFBEB; color: #B45309; border-color: #FDE68A; } .ds-badge--success { background: #F0FDF4; color: #15803D; border-color: #BBF7D0; } .ds-badge--info { background: #EFF6FF; color: #1D4ED8; border-color: #BFDBFE; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Dark navy shell with teal brand mark. Active route has teal-tinted highlight.
components.html: ABA ShieldPipelineClients
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: #0B1220; padding: 0 24px; height: 56px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1E293B; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin-right: 16px; } .ds-nav-brand-accent { color: #2DD4BF; } .ds-nav-item { position: relative; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #94A3B8; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #e2e8f0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #ffffff; background: rgba(13,148,136,0.25); border: 1px solid rgba(13,148,136,0.4); }

narrative.overview:
ABA Shield presents itself the way a skilled clinician presents in a care setting: measured, authoritative, and focused. Every visual decision reflects the practitioner using the tool — someone who commands their workflow without drama, reads status at a glance, and trusts the system to get out of the way. The interface doesn't perform competence; it enables it.

The visual language is restrained teal-on-warm-white. A single action color (teal) carries all interactive weight; the warm off-white canvas (#F8F7F4) prevents the sterility of pure white without introducing warmth that might feel frivolous in a clinical context.

This system explicitly rejects the dense gray aesthetic of legacy EHR software, the pastel-gradient friendliness of consumer wellness apps, and the metric-card-on-dark-background pattern common to startup dashboards.
keyCharacteristics: Warm off-white canvas, not clinical white
Single teal action color — its presence is the signal
Syne for display authority, DM Sans for clarity, DM Mono for technical data
Flat surfaces by default; borders and subtle shadows define depth
Status via color + icon pair — never color alone

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Teal appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the system's pulse.

rules.name: The Status Pair Rule
rules.body: Every status indicator pairs color with an icon or text label. Color alone is inaccessible and ambiguous.

rules.name: The Mono Contract
rules.body: DM Mono appears only on values the user might copy exactly. Never on UI labels, headings, or descriptive text.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadow appears only as a response to state change.

dos: Do keep teal to ≤10% of any screen.
Do pair every status color with a text label or icon.
Do use DM Mono exclusively for copyable values (cert numbers, IDs, timestamps).
Do use Syne only for display-level headings.
Do apply focus:border-teal-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-100 consistently across all inputs.
Do use the warm canvas (#F8F7F4) as the app background — never pure white.
Do pair shadow with state change — flat at rest, whisper on hover.
donts: Don't use legacy EHR aesthetics: dense gray layouts, flat blue borders, small gray text on gray backgrounds.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use dark mode for aesthetic reasons.
Don't use consumer health aesthetics: pastel gradients, rounded blob shapes.
Don't invent a new accent color. Teal is the only action color.
Don't add a second display font. The typographic system is fixed.
